title: Infinite Stronghold
description: Ever thought strongholds should be the only structure? With this datapack, they can be! This datapack makes the world out of exclusively strongholds, like skyblock, but with strongholds instead of an island.
body:
![Infinite Stronghold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2537a039a1eda27aedd6903db6d75f18d4c6f1bb.png)
The stronghold is the only structure in minecraft that makes it possible to beat the game (and reach all dimensions) without any outside materials, structures or items. Because of this, we decided to make a datapack that limited the world to strongholds that spawned much more frequently. In this world, there will be only strongholds or void.
